title: Implement Remaining 18 Avatar Trait Subclasses
description: The base class architecture is complete. Each remaining ADHD trait needs a concrete subclass implementing get_adhd_trait_impact() and simulate_struggle(). See the implementation_pattern section below for a complete code example. Reference implementation available in src/avatars/adhd_traits/attention_deficit.py.
pattern_to_follow: See implementation_pattern below for a complete example
required_methods: get_adhd_trait_impact(task_context) -> Dict with difficulty_modifier, quality_modifier, time_modifier, cognitive_load_modifier, and struggle_indicators

implementation_pattern.description: Minimal implementation pattern for ADHD trait subclasses. See src/avatars/adhd_traits/attention_deficit.py for a complete reference implementation.

minimal_example.constructor: def __init__(self, avatar_id, trait_config, event_bus=None): call super().__init__(avatar_id, trait_config, event_bus=event_bus), then extract and store trait-specific config like self.intensity = trait_config.get('intensity', 0.7)
minimal_example.get_adhd_trait_impact: Returns dict with: difficulty_modifier (float, 1.0=baseline, >1.0=harder), quality_modifier (float, 0.0-1.0 where 0.0=no quality reduction, higher=more reduction), time_modifier (float, 1.0=baseline, >1.0=takes longer), cognitive_load_modifier (float, 0.0-1.0 scale), struggle_indicators (list of passive/diagnostic symptoms like 'high_distraction', 'low_focus')
minimal_example.simulate_struggle: Returns list of active/behavioral struggles that may modify avatar state, like 'focus_lost', 'task_abandoned', 'premature_action'

key_points: Inherit from BaseAvatar and call super().__init__() with event_bus parameter
Store trait-specific configuration from trait_config parameter
Implement get_adhd_trait_impact() returning all required modifiers
Implement simulate_struggle() returning list of struggle indicators
Use helper methods to organize trait-specific logic
Base calculations on task_context (task type, duration, complexity, etc.)
Make struggles authentic to the specific ADHD trait based on research
struggle_indicators (in get_adhd_trait_impact) are passive/diagnostic - observable symptoms like 'low_patience_tolerance' or 'high_distraction'
simulate_struggle() returns active/behavioral struggles that may modify state - actions like 'premature_action', 'task_interruption', or 'focus_lost'

notes: Each trait should have unique struggle patterns based on ADHD research
Use the ExperienceMemory system (inherited from BaseAvatar) — don't bypass it
New Avatar constructor should accept optional EventBus for shared event bus
Update attention_deficit.py constructor to also accept event_bus kwarg
See implementation_pattern above for complete example code
